cxu_object.claim: A ranging market regime is identified when price trend is bounded within plus or minus zero point two percent with no sustained directional movement occurring approximately forty to fifty percent of the time in ETH-USD markets

supporting_contexts.text: Ranging: price bounded, mean-reverting. 40-50% of time. Trend threshold: less than ±0.2% over measurement window. Characterized by price oscillating around a mean with Bollinger band position cycling between 15% and 85%.
Asia session (00:00-08:00 UTC) tends ranging, sometimes mild trends. Weekends tend ranging with lower volatility unless funding rate is at an extreme level.

hierarchy.document_title: AgDel Trading Wiki — One Week Intensive Results

trendThresholdPct.description: Maximum absolute price trend percentage to classify as ranging

frequencyPct.description: Expected percentage of time market spends in ranging regime

version.change_description: Initial regime model for ranging markets based on one week ETH-USD observation
